query:
ALTER TABLE crew 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ktaUrl TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS selfQuote TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS memberId VARCHAR(50) NULL;

ALTER TABLE proof_vault
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS downloadUrl TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sha256 VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS verifiedDate VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS type VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS caption TEXT NULL;

ALTER TABLE partners
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS verifyUrl TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS verifyLabel VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS partnerId VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS liveUrl TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isLiveUrl BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE;

ALTER TABLE reviews
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS crewMentionName VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS crewMentionPhoto TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS crewMentionRole VARCHAR(100) NULL;

ALTER TABLE crew 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ktaUrl TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS selfQuote TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS memberId VARCHAR(50) NULL;

ALTER TABLE proof_vault
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS downloadUrl TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sha256 VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS verifiedDate VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS type VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS caption TEXT NULL;

ALTER TABLE partners
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS verifyUrl TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS verifyLabel VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS partnerId VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS liveUrl TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isLiveUrl BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE;

ALTER TABLE reviews
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS crewMentionName VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS crewMentionPhoto TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS crewMentionRole VARCHAR(100) NULL;
